title: Home in Rockaway Beach · ★4.99 · 6 bedrooms · 8 beds · 3 baths
description: Welcome to your private oasis in Rockaway Beach, Oregon! This exclusive retreat boasts a cedar barrel sauna, a hot tub, a revitalizing cold plunge,...

amenity_groups.title: Bedroom and laundry
items: Essentials - Towels, bed sheets, soap, and toilet paper

amenity_groups.title: Family
items: Pack ’n play/Travel crib - always at the listing - Sheets provided, room-darkening shades
Children’s books and toys for ages 0-2 years old, 2-5 years old, and 5-10 years old
Standalone high chair - always at the listing - With straps/harness and food tray
Baby bath - always at the listing
Changing table - always at the listing
Baby monitor - always at the listing
Children's playroom - An indoor room with toys, books, and games for children

amenity_groups.title: Home safety
items: Exterior security cameras on property - Please note that there are active security cameras that monitor the front door and driveway area when the house is vacant. There are no cameras in the hot tub area, backyard or inside of the home.

amenity_groups.title: Kitchen and dining
items: Kitchen - Space where guests can cook their own meals
Additional refrigerator/freezer in garage as well refrigerator
Cooking basics - Pots and pans, oil, salt and pepper
Dishes and silverware - Bowls, chopsticks, plates, cups, etc.
Coffee maker: drip coffee maker, french press, Keurig coffee machine
Barbecue utensils - Grill, charcoal, bamboo skewers/iron skewers, etc.

amenity_groups.title: Location features
items: Shared beach access - Guests can enjoy a nearby beach
Private entrance - Separate street or building entrance

amenity_groups.title: Outdoor
items: Private backyard – Not fully fenced - An open space on the property usually covered in grass
Beach essentials - Beach towels, umbrella, beach blanket, snorkeling gear

amenity_groups.title: Parking and facilities
items: Private hot tub - available all year, open 24 hours

amenity_groups.title: Services
items: Pets allowed - Assistance animals are always allowed
Luggage dropoff allowed - For guests' convenience when they have early arrival or late departure
Long term stays allowed - Allow stay for 28 days or more

message: Listing summary detected from the public Airbnb page.
